long_description:
[SDN]-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted:[STAGING] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://w3.ibm.com/services/lighthouse/wikis/view/a18a9d34-1b59-405b-b480-c973100f188d/bba0283a-6254-444f-bdf7-8632e1294e1d
TIP Situation: Observed service-error-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted issue in fabcon
TIP Short Description: [SDN] The average value of the default route deleted taken over a minute is positive in us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zonelet/dal1-qz6-sr6-rk043-s08
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-sdn:us-south-ngdc-test::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zonelet::dal1-qz6-sr6-rk043-s08

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max by (host_hostname,agent_tag_cluster,agent_tag_crn_location)(avg_over_time(fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted[1m])) > 0 = 0.3333
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone1-zonelet' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-south-ngdc-test' and host_hostname = 'dal1-qz6-sr6-rk043-s08'

Time:             12/03/2025 03:35 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179341941%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [SDN]-fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted:[STAGING]
Description:  The alert is generated when default route in fabcon got removed due to FRR restart or connection between TOR is broken, and the routes are not learnt for more than 1 minute
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   max by (host_hostname,agent_tag_cluster,agent_tag_crn_location)(avg_over_time(fabcon_route_stats_default_route_deleted[1m])) > 0
Duration: 1 m
Alert URL:    https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D1237554
